SpiniX vs Square Loyalty: FAQ

Can I use SpiniX if I already have Square POS?

Yes. SpiniX is POS-independent. Your Square POS handles payments, SpiniX handles loyalty, reviews, and guest engagement. They don't conflict.

Does SpiniX replace Square Marketing too?

Partially. SpiniX includes automated email sequences (welcome, follow-up, win-back) at no extra cost. For advanced SMS campaigns or custom segmentation, you may still want a dedicated email tool.

How does SpiniX collect Google reviews?

After a guest spins the wheel and claims their reward, SpiniX shows a one-tap prompt to leave a Google review. 33% of guests follow through — that's 10–20x higher than asking manually.

What if my guests don't have Apple or Google Wallet?

The core experience (spin the wheel, claim reward, leave review) works via any mobile browser. The Wallet pass is an optional bonus that increases return visits through push notifications.

Is €29/month really the full price? No per-visit fees?

Yes. €29/month flat. Unlimited guests, unlimited spins, unlimited emails. No per-visit charges, no add-on fees, no hardware costs.

Can I try SpiniX before canceling Square Loyalty?

Absolutely. Most restaurants run both side-by-side for a week to compare. Your first month with SpiniX is 90% off (€2.90) so there's almost no risk.

Ready to actually bring guests back?

Try SpiniX for €2.90 your first month. Works with any POS. No per-visit fees.
